title: How can I help?
meta_description: If you live in the Penistone and Stocksbridge area and have an issue that you care about or a problem that needs addressing, please let me know.
text_excerpt: How can I help? Skip to content Home About Marie News Priorities Get in touch > Newsletter Toggle menu Marie Tidball MP How can I help? If you live in the Penistone and Stocksbridge area and have an issue that you care about or a problem that needs addressing, you can let me know. Check if I'm your MP > Get in touch with me > Promoted by and on behalf of Marie Tidball at P&S Labour, P.O.
